awards.title: Ethical Thinking and Case Analysis in Artificial Intelligence Education

papers.title: Reliability evaluation method of guided missile system based on multi-source information fusion
papers.abstract: When evaluating the flight reliability of guided munitions, the results of using D-S evidence theory to fuse conflicting evidence will be biased. Aiming at this problem, an improved method of D-S evidence theory based on weighted Lance distance is proposed. The evidence is preprocessed first, and the weighted Lance distance is used to calculate the degree to which different evidence is supported by other evidence. The product of the credibility determined by the Lance distance and the uncertainty determined by the entropy weight is used as the fusion weight to modify the mass function, and then the D-S evidence theory is used to obtain the result. Finally, the method is compared with the traditional D-S evidence fusion theory and Bayes fusion theory. The results show that this method can more effectively fuse conflicting evidence than other methods and improve the accuracy of the reliability assessment of the flight reliability of guided munitions.

papers.title: Fault Diagnosis Method of Complex Supply and Transportation Mechanism Based on EEMD Multi-scale Sample Entropy and PSO-SVM
papers.venue: ACM Cloud and Autonomic Computing Conference
papers.abstract: The complex supply and transportation mechanism has the characteristics of difficult feature extraction. However, traditional fault recognition methods have disadvantages such as poor noise robustness and low fault recognition accuracy. In order to improve the accuracy of recognition, through combining Ensemble Empirical Mode Decomposition (EEMD) with Multi-scale Sample Entropy (MSE), a fault diagnosis method of complex supply and transportation mechanism based on EEMD-MSE and Particle Swarm Optimization Support Vector Machine (PSO-SVM) is proposed. First, the method performs cross-correlation information analysis on a series of stable Intrinsic Mode Functions (IMF) of different time scales obtained by EEMD decomposition of the original vibration signal to reconstruct the signal; Then, the MSE of the reconstructed signal is calculated to construct a feature vector, which is divided into a training set and a test set; The penalty parameters and kernel function parameters are optimized through the PSO algorithm. The optimized SVM is used as a multi-fault classifier, and the training set is used as the input vector to train the vector machine to obtain the optimal parameters. The trained model is detected by using the test set to verify the accuracy of effective fault diagnosis. The bench test of the ammunition supply mechanism has proved that the proposed method can effectively identify its health status and failure type.

papers.title: Research on Data Fusion for Flight Reliability Evaluation of Guided Munitions
papers.venue: International Conference Information Management and Management Sciences
papers.abstract: Aiming at the reliability evaluation process of guided ammunition, different reliability information is fused into mass function. In the fusion process, the expert experience information is subjective, and the evaluation result will be subjective if it is directly fused with the test data. Considering this problem, this paper uses the method based on the combination of D-S evidence theory and reliability entropy to fuse the data, At the same time, in order to increase the amount of data and make the evaluation process more reliable, reliability growth information is added on the basis of two kinds of information fusion, so that the evaluation process can make full use of the experimental data in the development cycle, and the reliability and weight of each evidence are revised again for the conflict problem of three kinds of information fusion, The modified three kinds of information are fused by D-S evidence theory synthesis rules. The analysis results show that the fusion method used in this paper can effectively improve the conflict problem, make the mass function value obtained by fusion more reliable, and provide a new idea for the reliability evaluation of guided ammunition.
